---
title: "Research Cycle Handbook"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
css: research-cycle-handbook/handbook-styles.css
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- what and who section -->
<div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card bg-light-subtle border shadow-sm h-100 rounded-3 p-2">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
          <span class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 flex-shrink-0"
                style="width:44px; height:44px; background-color:#eaf5ee;">
            <i class="bi bi-book" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#00883A;"></i>
          </span>
          <h5 class="card-title fw-semibold mb-0" style="color:#00883A;">What is this handbook?</h5>
        </div>
        <p class="card-text" style="line-height:1.75; text-align:justify;">
          This open research cycle handbook provides <strong class="text-black">detailed practical guidance for making research open, responsible, and reproducible by design</strong>. It covers the full research life cycle, from formulating questions and preregistering studies to publishing articles, data, and code. It links to our self-paced tutorials, LMU support services, and essential tools to support open research in everyday practice.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card bg-light-subtle border shadow-sm h-100 rounded-3 p-2">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mb-3">
          <span class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 flex-shrink-0"
                style="width:44px; height:44px; background-color:#eaf5ee;">
            <i class="bi bi-people" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#00883A;"></i>
          </span>
          <h5 class="card-title fw-semibold mb-0" style="color:#00883A;">Who is it for?</h5>
        </div>
        <p class="card-text" style="line-height:1.75;text-align:justify;">
          This manual can be used by <strong class="text-black">individual researchers in any scientific field </strong> but is primarily designed to be adapted and adopted by  <strong class="text-black">research groups</strong> as a whole. Each section outlines concrete actions for ongoing projects and concludes with a team checkpoint.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- navigate orc section -->
<div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  <div class="col-12">
    <div class="card bg-light-subtle border shadow-sm rounded-3 p-2">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center gap-3 mb-3">
          <span class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 flex-shrink-0"
          style="width:44px; height:44px; background-color:#eaf5ee;">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#00883A;"></i>
          </span>
          <h5 class="card-title fw-semibold mb-0" style="color:#00883A;">Navigate our open research cycle handbook</h5>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex justify-content-center">
          {{< include images/os-cycle.svg >}}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- how to build section -->
<div class="row g-3 mb-4">
  <div class="col-12">
    <div class="card bg-light-subtle border shadow-sm rounded-3 p-2">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center  justify-content-center gap-3 mb-3">
          <span class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-3 flex-shrink-0"
                style="width:44px; height:44px; background-color:#eaf5ee;">
            <i class="bi bi-tools" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#00883A;"></i>
          </span>
          <h5 class="card-title fw-semibold mb-0" style="color:#00883A;">How to build your own lab handbook?</h5>
        </div>
        <div class="justify-content-center" style="line-height:1.75;">
        Based on our material, it is easy to build a tailored research practice handbook for your own research group (see <a href="https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16262260">example</a>):
        <ul>
          <li>review the core discipline-agnostic sections by clicking on one of the quadrants in the figure above, </li>
          <li>consult discipline-specific guidance (in development - ETA end 2026)<!--to link to Reema's expert pages when built - with the design of internal link button? -->, </li>
          <li>tailor the <a href="https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15630229">overview checklist figure</a> <!-- create/share an editable file, e.g. pptx on zenodo-->, </li>
          <li>use our lab-handbook template as a starting place (in development - ETA end 2026) <!-- should this be a quarto website or something easier to edit? --></li>
          You can request a consultation with the LMU Open Science Center: ranging from a 1h one-on-one consultation up to a 6-month training and consultation program for your entire research group (see <a href="#about-orc-project">About this Project</a> below).
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!--About this project-->

<div class="accordion my-4 mx-2 rounded-3 shadow-sm bg-light-subtle" id="accordionExample">
  <div class="accordion-item">
    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="headingOne">
      <button class="accordion-button collapsed custom-accordion-btn fw-semibold fs-5" type="button" 
              data-bs-toggle="collapse" 
              data-bs-target="#collapseOne" 
              aria-expanded="false">
        About this project
      </button>
    </h2>

    <div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse">
      <div class="accordion-body p-4" style="line-height:1.75;text-align:justify;">
        <p>
          This work is part of the <strong class="text-black">“Switch-to-Open Program”</strong> (SwOP) funded by the 
          <a href="https://www.volkswagenstiftung.de/en">Volkswagen Foundation</a>.
        </p>
        <p>
          This program consists of a <strong class="text-black">6-month structured development program for research groups</strong>, 
          centered on the co-creation of a tailored research practices lab handbook and culminating in a departmental seminar to facilitate adoption by other groups.
        </p>
        <p>This program is designed to:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>improve workflow efficiency and reproducibility by establishing clear, standardized procedures and documentation</li>
          <li>facilitate onboarding and collaboration through a shared, practice-oriented lab handbook</li>
          <li>
            support compliance with FAIR and Open Science requirements 
            (see e.g. 
            <a href="https://cms-cdn.lmu.de/media/contenthub/amtliche-veroeffentlichungen/gwp-ordnung.pdf">
              LMU good research practice guidelines
            </a>)
            and enable researchers to meet evolving recruitment and funding expectations
          </li>
        </ul>
        <h5 class="fw-semibold">Interested in entering the Switch-to-Open Program (SwOP) with your research group?</h5>
        <a href="mailto:Malika.ihle@lmu.de?subject=Interest%20in%20the%20Switch-to-Open%20Program"
          class="btn btn-primary btn-pop my-2">
          Contact us
        </a>
        <h5 class="fw-semibold">How to cite our handbook</h5>
        <p>
          Our handbook and other material are licensed 
          <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/deed.en">CC-BY-SA 4.0</a>.
          Please feel free to reuse, adapt, and share openly by citing 
          <br>
          <strong class="text-black">
          Ihle Malika, Gupta Reema, Schönbrodt Felix, April 2026, Open Research Cycle Handbook <a href="https://lmu-osc.github.io/training/research-cycle-handbook.html">https://lmu-osc.github.io/training/research-cycle-handbook.html</a> CC-BY-SA 4.0 LMU Open Science Center</strong>
        </p>
        <h5 class="fw-semibold">Acknowledgements</h5>
        <p>
          The following people contributed to the writing and revisions of this handbook: Alberto Villagran Asiares, Anja Betz, Pat Callahan, Sara Lil Middleton, Sarah Von Grebmer Zu Wolfsthurn.  
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- Modals for Pop-out Content -->
<!-- Wrapped in raw HTML block to prevent rendering issues -->
<!-- Phase 1 Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="modalPhase1" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="modalPhase1Label" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h5 class="modal-title" id="modalPhase1Label">
          <i class="bi bi-clipboard-check me-2"></i> 1. Plan & Design
        </h5>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Explore / reuse research outputs</li>
          <li>Check legal frameworks</li>
          <li>Write Research Data Management (RDM) plan</li>
          <li>Design study and plan statistical analyses</li>
        </ul>
        <hr>
        <p><strong>Team checkpoints:</strong> study plan presentation + preregistration submission</p>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-footer">
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Close</button>
        <a href="/training/research-cycle-handbook/01-plan-and-design.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Go to Handbook - Plan & Design</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 2 Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="modalPhase2" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="modalPhase2Label" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h5 class="modal-title" id="modalPhase2Label">
          <i class="bi bi-hdd-network me-2"></i> 2. Collect & Manage
        </h5>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Collect data following standard protocols</li>
          <li>Manage data efficiently, and FAIR-ly by design</li>
          <li>Anonymise data</li>
          <li>Control data quality</li>
        </ul>
        <hr>
        <p><strong>Team checkpoint:</strong> data quality validation meeting</p>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-footer">
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Close</button>
        <a href="/training/research-cycle-handbook/02-collect-and-manage.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Go to Handbook - Collect & Manage</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 3 Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="modalPhase3" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="modalPhase3Label" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h5 class="modal-title" id="modalPhase3Label">
          <i class="bi bi-graph-up me-2"></i> 3. Analyze & Collaborate
        </h5>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Process and analyze data reproducibly</li>
          <li>Write reproducible reports and follow reporting guidelines</li>
        </ul>
        <hr>
        <p><strong>Team checkpoints:</strong> repository & code peer-review + result presentation</p>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-footer">
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Close</button>
        <a href="/training/research-cycle-handbook/03-analyze-and-collaborate.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Go to Handbook - Analyze & Collaborate</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Phase 4 Modal -->
<div class="modal fade" id="modalPhase4" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="modalPhase4Label" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-header">
        <h5 class="modal-title" id="modalPhase4Label">
          <i class="bi bi-share me-2"></i> 4. Preserve & Share
        </h5>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-body">
        <ul>
          <li>Publish data and/or metadata and data use agreement</li>
          <li>Publish code (with real, simulated or synthetic data)</li>
          <li>Deposit a preprint</li>
        </ul>
        <p>each with contributorships, persistent identifiers, license.</p>
        <hr>
        <p><strong>Team checkpoint:</strong> manuscript submission with DOIs for all materials</p>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-footer">
        <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Close</button>
        <a href="/training/research-cycle-handbook/04-preserve-and-share.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Go to Handbook - Preserve & Share</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {

  function triggerModal(phaseId) {
    var modalId = '#modalPhase' + phaseId.split('-')[1];
    var modalEl = document.querySelector(modalId);
    if (modalEl) {
      var modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalEl);
      modal.show();
    }
  }

  ['phase-1', 'phase-2', 'phase-3', 'phase-4'].forEach(function(id) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;

    el.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();      // 🚫 stop DOI navigation
      e.stopPropagation();     // 🚫 stop bubbling to <a> in SVG
      triggerModal(id);
    });

    el.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        triggerModal(id);
      }
    });
  });
});
</script>
